title: FAIR self-assessment + provenance completeness audit
context: Before release sign-off, a FAIR self-assessment plus a provenance-completeness audit confirm the project is Findable, Accessible, Interoperable, Reusable and 100% provenance-traced (PLAN §8 M3). Binding guardrails: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA/biobanks) and identifiable patient data are out of scope; COSMIC/OncoKB/MSigDB-restricted are recipe-reference only; no clinical/diagnostic/prognostic/treatment language; research-only, not medical advice; provenance on every assertion.
objective: Complete a FAIR self-assessment and a provenance-completeness audit, confirming 100% provenance coverage and documenting any gaps.
acceptanceCriteria: A FAIR checklist is completed with evidence for each principle.
Provenance completeness is audited; coverage is reported and gaps are listed with remediation.
Audit confirms no restricted-source bytes are redistributed.
